channel.title: Paper Annotator Updates
channel.description: Signed macOS updates for Paper Annotator.

item.description:
# Paper Annotator 1.1.0
**Sweep Pass (速扫模式)** — mark 100–200 awkward sentences by intuition, batch-rewrite them with agents, review fast, and write them all back.
- **Sentence-click marking**: toggle Sweep mode in the reading pane — one click marks a whole sentence with the sticky preset, click again to undo. Number keys 1–0 switch the active preset; Esc clears the pending selection. - **速扫 / 语感 preset**: a new quick-mark chip routes "reads awkward" marks to the language-quality skill — no web-source requirement, built for pure phrasing passes. - **Focus Mode keyboard review**: press A to accept the shown candidate and auto-advance, Z to revoke; arrow keys skip without deciding. - **Batch dispatch**: `export-agent-prompt --max-per-batch N` splits large skill×section groups into deterministic sub-batches sized for parallel sub-agents; language-quality batches are exempt from the per-candidate tradeoff requirement. - **Batch writeback**: `commit --all-accepted` writes every accepted candidate back to the manuscript — one commit each, descending source order, with a span-conflict pre-check and resumable progress. - **Standalone manuscript HTML**: `export-manuscript-html` renders the current manuscript to a self-contained journal-styled HTML file. - **Problematized writing prompts**: the appeal-tune and final-review skills now demand real problematization (name the corrected premise or the doctrinal incoherence) instead of rhetorical polish.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.0.1
- Adds **Check for Updates…** to the Paper Annotator application menu. - Runs Sparkle's foreground update check so the result is shown immediately. - Keeps automatic background update checks enabled.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.

# Paper Annotator 1.0.0
The first standalone macOS release of Paper Annotator.
- Open Markdown Manuscripts or paired HTML Previews from Finder, the File menu, drag-and-drop, or Recent Files. - Read in journal or plain-Markdown views while preserving source-offset Anchors. - Create, route, review, and human-accept Candidates without writing the Manuscript. - Run fully offline with the Node engine, Source Han Serif font, and review workbench bundled inside the app. - Install from a signed, notarized drag-and-drop DMG. - Receive future signed updates through the public Sparkle channel; installation remains user-controlled.
Requirements: Apple silicon Mac running macOS 10.13 or later.
